prompt: Translate this English proverb into two other languages in a way that preserves the spirit, not the words: 'The best time to plant a tree was twenty years ago. The second best time is now.' Add a one-sentence note on each.
response:
In Spanish: "Lo mejor es plantar un árbol hace 20 años. La segunda mejor opción es ahora mismo."
Note: This translation maintains the spirit of the proverb by using a similar structure and emphasizing the urgency of the present.

In French: "Le meilleur moment pour planter un arbre, c'était il y a 20 ans. La deuxième meilleure option, c'est maintenant."
Note: This translation also preserves the original meaning by using similar wording and stressing the importance of taking action in the present|im_end|>
